page_content:
Restriction: Must have permission of LGBT Studies Program.

LGBT359 Special Topics in LGBTQ+ Literatures and Media (3 Credits) Selected study of a topic pertinent to literary and cultural expressions of LGBTQt+ identities, positionalities, and analytics through an exploration of literature, art, and/or media.

Cross-listed with: ENGL359.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
